stories.title: Copy of 13 stats that prove the USMNT will win the World C...
stories.summary: Think the U.S. isn't a favorite to lift the trophy on July 19? A look back through the tournament's history will make you think again.

stories.title: Oklahoma AG calls on Big 12 to suspend Sorsby
stories.summary: Oklahoma Attorney General Gentner Drummond is calling on the Big 12 Conference to suspend Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby.

stories.title: Dempsey slams Marsch over anthem: Stay in lane
stories.summary: United States legend Clint Dempsey had some choice words for former national team assistant Jesse Marsch, who suggested Thursday that some American players needed encouragement to sing the anthem ahead of games.

stories.title: Ohtani not in Dodgers' lineup Friday, but avoids I...
stories.summary: Two-way star Shohei Ohtani was not in the Dodgers' lineup for their series opener against the White Sox on Friday, one day after he was removed from a game in Pittsburgh because of left knee inflammation.

stories.title: Spurs' Johnson believes in Fox ahead of Game 5
stories.summary: Spurs coach Mitch Johnson emphasized his belief in De'Aaron Fox on the heels of his rough showing in Game 4.
